creator: quentin.thebault@defenso.fr
text:
Additional info and testing:
- Host CPU is a AMD Ryzen 7 PRO 7840U w/ Radeon 780M Graphic
- Using `amd_hostbridge` in bhyve does not change anything
- Using wired memory with `wired_memory="yes"` with vm-bhyve (resulting in `-S` for bhyve) does not change anything
- Ubuntu 24.04.1 server liveCD crashes on boot
- Windows 10 also crashes on welcome screen if the wifi card driver is installed
- These crashes take the host with it. Freeze, then reboot.
